about.title: Let's work together
about.text1: I am a junior full-stack developer currently in training, focusing on modern web applications and practical software development. I started in frontend development using Angular, TypeScript, and modern UI concepts. During this time, I learned how to write clean, structured, and maintainable code while building user-focused interfaces.
about.text2: Throughout my training, I gradually expanded my knowledge into backend development. This includes initial experience with Django and Django REST Framework, API design, as well as basic server and deployment processes. I also gained hands-on experience in setting up and managing servers, which helped me understand the full lifecycle of an application from development to production deployment.
about.team: An important part of my growth has also been working in team projects. I have contributed to two collaborative projects: Join and Kochwelt. In Join, I worked closely with other developers across frontend and backend, gaining valuable experience in API integration and team collaboration.

work.title: My Work
work.intro: Here are some projects I completed during my software development training. Most of them were developed independently, while Join was created in a collaborative team environment. These projects helped me gain practical experience in frontend development, backend development, and modern web technologies.

coderr.title: Coderr
coderr.description: A fully developed full-stack freelancer platform built from planning and architecture to production deployment. Developed with Angular, Django REST Framework, and PostgreSQL. Features include REST APIs, authentication, role-based permissions, offer, review, and order management, as well as deployment on an Ubuntu server using Gunicorn, Nginx, and Cloudflare.

join.title: Join
join.description: Join is a collaborative Kanban tool developed as a team project. During this project, I gained practical experience working between frontend and backend systems, including APIs, component architecture, and modern Angular workflows.

bookstore.title: BookStore
bookstore.description: A modern web application for browsing and managing books. The focus was on clean UI structure, responsive design, and maintainable frontend architecture.

pollo.title: El Pollo Loco
pollo.description: A 2D jump-and-run game developed with vanilla JavaScript. The project includes object-oriented programming, game physics, collision detection, animations, and keyboard-based controls. It helped me deepen my understanding of game architecture and browser-based rendering.

pokedex.title: DexHub
pokedex.description: An interactive DexHub application connected to an external API. The project improved my understanding of asynchronous data handling, dynamic rendering, and structured API integration.

team.title: Looking for a team player?
team.subtitle: What my teammates say about me

james.name: Volker Derksen
james.quote: Mohamed works reliably, in a structured and solution-oriented way. In the Join project, he stood out through clean code and clear communication within the team.

evelyn.name: Patrick Schauer
evelyn.quote: I see Mohamed as a friendly and courteous developer within the team who implements features with great care. In particular, he places strong emphasis on maintaining a clean Git workflow. At times, he has delivered features beyond the teams expectations in record time. On a personal level, I got along well with him, as he consistently interacts with others in a very polite and respectful manner.

noah.name: Levin Krischer
noah.quote: Mohamed actively contributed to feature development and integrated well into the team. His structured way of working was especially valuable throughout the project.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Got a problem to solve?
contact.description: I’m always open to connecting about exciting projects, collaborative teamwork, and opportunities in frontend or full-stack development. Currently, I’m looking for a position where I can continue growing my skills and gain practical experience with modern web technologies.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.intro1: This portfolio has been created to showcase my skills, projects, and experience as a Fullstack Developer.
legal.intro2: Some projects were developed as part of my training, educational programs, or personal learning journey.
legal.disclaimerText: The content presented on this website is intended for informational and portfolio purposes only. References to technologies, projects, and experiences reflect my personal and professional development and do not constitute commercial offers or services.
legal.copyright2: All content, source code, images, and project descriptions published on this website are protected by applicable copyright laws.
legal.copyright3: Unauthorized reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of any materials without prior written permission is prohibited.
legal.generalText: The protection of your personal data is important to me. This website is operated in accordance with the applicable data protection regulations, in particular the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
legal.responsibleText1: Responsible for data processing on this website:
legal.hostingText1: This website is hosted by Hetzner Online GmbH.
legal.hostingText2: Hetzner Online GmbH, Industriestr. 25, 91710 Gunzenhausen, Germany.
legal.hostingText3: When visiting this website, server log files may be collected automatically by the hosting provider.
legal.logsText: The hosting provider may automatically collect and store information in server log files, including IP address, date and time of access, browser type and version, operating system, referrer URL, and requested pages. These data are processed solely to ensure the secure and stable operation of the website and are not combined with other data sources.
legal.contactFormText: If you contact me via the contact form, the information you provide (e.g., name, email address, and message) will be stored and processed solely for the purpose of responding to your inquiry. The processing of this data is based on Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR and Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR.
legal.emailText: If you contact me via email, the information transmitted will be stored for the purpose of processing your request. The data will not be shared with third parties unless required by law.
legal.externalText: This website contains links to external websites, including GitHub and LinkedIn. Please note that I have no influence over the content or privacy practices of external websites. The respective operators are solely responsible for their content.
legal.sslText: For security reasons and to protect the transmission of confidential information, this website uses SSL/TLS encryption.
legal.rightsText: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights: right of access, right to rectification, right to erasure, right to restriction of processing, right to data portability, and right to object to processing.
legal.complaintText: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority if you believe that the processing of your personal data violates applicable data protection laws.
legal.changesText: I reserve the right to amend this Privacy Policy at any time to ensure compliance with current legal requirements or to reflect changes to this website.
